headline: Greyparrot and Kenvue Collaborate to Help Accelerate Circular Packaging Efforts with AI-Powered Material Recovery Intelligence
summary: SUMMIT, N.J., May 20, 2026--Greyparrot, the leader in AI-powered waste intelligence, announces a collaboration with Kenvue, the world’s largest pure-play consumer health company.

raw.headline: Greyparrot and Kenvue Collaborate to Help Accelerate Circular Packaging Efforts with AI-Powered Material Recovery Intelligence
raw.summary: SUMMIT, N.J., May 20, 2026--Greyparrot, the leader in AI-powered waste intelligence, announces a collaboration with Kenvue, the world’s largest pure-play consumer health company.

headline: Kenvue tracks packaging through recycling stream with Greyparrot’s AI
summary: The collaboration spotlights use cases for AI in packaging, such as pinpointing the optimal hue for shampoo bottles to ensure recyclability. Identifying design changes gains importance as the packaging regulation landscape widens.
